# SimplyTools - GST Calculator & Accounting Software Comparison

> SimplyTools is a professional, lightning-fast suite of business utility tools designed for Indian shopkeepers, SMEs, freelancers, and accountants.

## Core Features

- **GST Calculator**: Calculate CGST, SGST, and IGST breakdowns instantly with custom rate inputs, simple toggles to Add/Remove GST, and visual percentage splits.
- **Partner Software Comparison**: Side-by-side assessment of India's top accounting software, including Vyapar App (Referral code `6VDQKQM`), Zoho Books, Giddh Accounting, and TallyPrime 5.0.
- **Comprehensive GST Knowledge Base**: Built-in guides, mathematical formulas, and active slab references for absolute tax compliance.

## Links

- [GST Calculator](https://simplytools.in/) - Main application and tool
- [Vyapar App Offer](https://www.vyaparapp.in/?referrer_code=6VDQKQM) - Dedicated billing app with exclusive referrer advantages
- [Zoho Books](https://www.zoho.com/books/) - Cloud GST certified system
- [Giddh Accounting](https://giddh.com/) - Double-entry cloud portal
- [Tally Prime](https://tallysolutions.com/) - Regional standard accounting software
